name: Kahlua Cocoa Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the Kahlua and corn syrup with the candied cherries and raisins.
2. Add the remaining ingredients; blend well until combined.
3. Shape into small balls.
4. Roll each ball in the desired coating.
5. Cover and store in a cool, dark place.
COATINGS: Cocoa powder, powdered sugar, flaked coconut, finely chopped nuts, sprinkles.
